title: Initialize a vector of student grades

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to declare and initialize vectors in C++.
We show different types of initialization including empty, with size, with values, and copying another vector.

---

**When executed, the code will display**
```java
Vectors have been declared. Printing their contents:
Quiz Scores: 0 0 0 0 0 
Exam Scores: 100 100 100 
Homework Grades: 95 87 93 90 
Backup Grades: 95 87 93 90 
```
